item_text: u-environment -> register activity — type=flow; label="register activity"; explanation="initiates registration process"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-u-environment-001 title: user registration module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: valid email, password, and confirm password test steps: 1. navigate to the "register activity" from the u-environment 2. enter a valid email address 3. enter a valid password 4. confirm the password 5. click on the "register" button expected result: user should be registered successfully and redirected to the login page

item_text: u-environment -> login activity — type=flow; label="login activity"; explanation="handles user login"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-u-environment-003 title: user login module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: user has been registered test data: registered email and password test steps: 1. navigate to the "login activity" from the u-environment 2. enter the registered email address 3. enter the registered password 4. click on the "login" button expected result: user should be logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard

item_text: u-environment -> newsletter activity — type=flow; label="newsletter activity"; explanation="manages newsletter functionality"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-u-environment-005 title: manage newsletters module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in test data: subscription status (subscribe/unsubscribe) test steps: 1. navigate to the "newsletter activity" from the u-environment 2. select the newsletter to subscribe or unsubscribe 3. click on the "subscribe" or "unsubscribe" button expected result: user's subscription status should be updated accordingly

item_text: u-environment -> flash activity — type=flow; label="flash activity"; explanation="handles flash activity"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-u-environment-007 title: join/view event module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: event exists and user is logged in test data: event id test steps: 1. navigate to the "join/view event" activity from the u-environment 2. select the event to join or view 3. click on the "join" or "view" button expected result: user should be able to join or view the selected event

item_text: u-environment -> create event — type=flow; label="create event"; explanation="allows event creation"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-u-environment-006 title: create event module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in test data: event name, date, time, location, description test steps: 1. navigate to the "create event" activity from the u-environment 2. fill in the event details (name, date, time, location, description) 3. click on the "create" button expected result: event should be created successfully and displayed in the list of events

best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-u-environment-008 title: manage user profile module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in test data: updated profile information (name, email, password) test steps: 1. navigate to the "profile" activity from the u-environment 2. update the profile information (name, email, password) 3. click on the "save" button expected result: user's profile information should be updated successfully
